tooltip.aerocali.traverse_board.usage: §6Right Click this Item to save your current coordinates to it for later usage
aerocali.ponder.thruster_functionality.t: This is the main Thruster unit.
By Powering it using a generator it gains FE.
When getting a redstone signal inputted...
aerocali.ponder.thruster_upgrading.text_: Normally the Thruster outputs fire particles with an okay amount of thrust and power consumption.
By right clicking on it with an Ionized Thermal Mechanism...
The Particles will become soul fire particles and the Thruster will require twice as much thrust and power consumption than normally.
When Powered by RPM it will generate FE
When the RPM is faster, the Generator will generate more FE/tick with a cap of 15 FE/tick
aerocali.ponder.tracker_functionality.te: It requires a shaft above with an RPM speed of at least 30
And a Navigation Table below to function.
When a Navigation Compass is inputted, the Tracker will output a redstone signal depending on how far away it is from the target.
The Tracker will also pass the compass immediately to the Navigation Table below.
